case_title: BANK OF AMERICA N. A. VS. MICHELLE KLOSKY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A. AS TO DEFENDANT KLOSKY, MICHELLE DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-27-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-04-2018
PAYER NOTIFIED OF PARTIAL PAYMENT OF FEE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100041176) AS TO DEFENDANT KLOSKY, MICHELLE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2018 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100037371) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035967), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A. SERVED JUL-19-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KLOSKY, MICHELLE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100041176) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KLOSKY, MICHELLE $36,963.55 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,963.55, SEE SCANNED DOC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100037324) AS TO DEFENDANT KLOSKY, MICHELLE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BALANCE OF FEE PAID FOR TRANSACTION W0818126F024 BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A.
DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S); (TRANSACTION ID # 100041176) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N. A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100041176) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
